title: Advanced Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations, Real-Time Filtering, and Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations, Real-Time Filtering, and Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50)'>
  <!-- Header Section -->
  <rect x='0' y='0' rx='10' width='350' height='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='15' y='25' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Advanced Analytics Dashboard</text>

  <!-- Query Playground -->
  <rect x='0' y='60' rx='10' width='200' height='150' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='10' y='80' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Query Playground</text>
  <text x='10' y='100' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Enter Query:</text>
  <rect x='10' y='120' rx='5' width='180' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF'/>
  <text x='15' y='145' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Examples:</text>
  <text x='15' y='165' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>- Metric A > 10</text>
  <text x='15' y='185' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>- Metric B < 5</text>

  <!-- Chart Section -->
  <rect x='220' y='60' rx='10' width='170' height='200' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='230' y='80' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Multi-Chart Visualizations</text>
  <rect x='230' y='100' rx='5' width='150' height='150' fill='#FFFFFF'/>
  <!-- Chart 1 -->
  <rect x='230' y='110' rx='5' width='30' height='100' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='250' y='110' rx='5' width='30' height='100' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <!-- Chart 2 -->
  <rect x='270' y='110' rx='5' width='30' height='100' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='290' y='110' rx='5' width='30' height='100' fill='#B7D7CD'/>

  <!-- Filtering Section -->
  <rect x='220' y='260' rx='10' width='170' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='230' y='280' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Real-Time Filtering</text>
  <rect x='230' y='300' rx='5' width='150' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF'/>
  <text x='235' y='325' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Select Metric:</text>
  <g transform='translate(230,340)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' rx='5' width='30' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='5' y='20' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'> Metric A</text>
    <rect x='35' y='0' rx='5' width='30' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <text x='40' y='20' fill='#000000' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'> Metric B</text>
  </g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement a query playground with examples and syntax highlighting
Must display real-time data with interactive filtering
Must use multi-chart visualizations with different metrics

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Analytics Dashboard with Multi-Chart Visualizations, Real-Time Filtering, and Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
